story-img-1.query: Elevating the Everyday We believe that fine jewelry shouldn't be reserved for special occasions. Velmora was born from a desire to create demi-fine pieces that offer the luxury of solid gold at an accessible price point. Each piece is designed to be worn, loved, and layered every single day.
